policies.name: Require resource tagging
policies.description: All EC2, RDS, and S3 resources must have Environment, Owner, and CostCenter tags

policies.name: Approved AMI list
policies.description: EC2 instances must use AMIs from the approved list

policies.name: S3 bucket naming convention
policies.description: S3 buckets must follow naming convention: <env>-<team>-<purpose>
